Scaled platform infrastructure, strategically projected to achieve 1M+ cumulative impressions by October 2025.

bullets: Spearheading empirical investigations into computational linguistics, analyzing hallucination variance and output fidelity across multiple Large Language Models processing complex code-mixed regional structures.
